seoTitle: North Macquarie vs North Manly — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Macquarie and North Manly. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Macquarie vs North Manly: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Macquarie and North Manly.
heading: North Macquarie vs North Manly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Macquarie, New South Wales and North Manly, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Manly has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to North Macquarie (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Macquarie or North Manly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Macquarie has a flood risk score of 53/100, while North Manly scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Macquarie scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. North Manly scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Macquarie or North Manly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Manly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
